description: Sidecar slicer/timeline real-world variants used to harden evidence beyond the active external-oracle pack.

fixtures.notes: Public free practice workbook from https://www.myexcelonline.com/blog/use-one-slicer-for-two-pivot-tables/ (direct workbook Use-one-slicer-for-two-pivot-tables.xlsx). Workbook metadata reports Application=Microsoft Excel and Company=myexcelonline.com. Covers a real Excel-authored shared slicer cache connected to two pivot tables on the same pivot cache.
